name: Flames in Modern Europe
short_description: A real-time global strategy game about the Old Continent! You are the leader of the state, and you must discover new technologies, build a powerful economy, armed forces and even nuclear weapons! But remember - the opposition will always be breathing down your neck...
detailed_description:
Flames in Modern Europe is not just a real-time grand strategy game, it also offers the chance to dive into the most interesting and exciting events of modern Europe, such as the Euromaidan and the Revolution of Dignity! Build a powerful economy on the Old Continent, or start a war against a neighboring state! Develop your nation, overcome political crises, and become part of the most thrilling moments of contemporary history!



As of summer 2025, the game remains in active development and receives regular updates that add a lot of new content, such as new mechanics, expansions of existing ones, graphics improvements, and numerous optimizations. Below you can read about what is currently available!



MAIN MECHANICS


  • Courses: in the country menu, you have several courses, for example, political and economic. These are your storyline and plan to achieve greatness in Europe.

  • Mentality: change the traits of your nation's mentality to adapt it to your style!

  • Decisions: make important decisions for your country that will help you fight corruption, improve stability, or even allow you to sell regions of your country.

  • Economy: build new structures that will work for the benefit of the state, such as

    • Offices that will generate new income for the state treasury

    • Laboratories that will work on new technologies

    • Nuclear and other power plants, which not only supply domestic consumers but whose energy can also be sold to other states!

    • Anti-Corruption Bureau (ACB), which will fight corruption in your country!

    • And much more: from roads to spaceports!

  • Use the budget menu to edit expenses and efficiency in various sectors of the country, such as construction, research, army, and administration. Hire additional construction companies to speed up building! Don’t forget about taxes as well!

  • Research: explore new technologies that will help your country become the most progressive.

  • Army: create new brigades, or launch nuclear weapons that will leave permanent scars on Earth...


ALSO


  • Diplomacy - offers many options, from trading electricity to forming alliances and even buying regions!

  • Wars between AI countries - depending on their aggression level, AI-controlled states will attack each other, and may even attack the player if relations are below 10!

  • Parliamentary and Presidential elections, which are held in two rounds!

  • Dynamic population of regions!

  • Stability, corruption, tax efficiency, mobilization, and other laws - all of these affect the situation in your country!



This game is a fictional alternate history. All events, characters, and situations depicted in the game are products of creative imagination and are not intended to exploit or offend any person or group of people. Any similarities to real individuals are unintentional and are used solely to provide realism to the gameplay. The goal of the game is to immerse players in an alternate development of events in modern Europe, rather than to reproduce actual history or political reality.

supported_languages: English, Polish, Ukrainian, German, French, Spanish - Spain
